title: Write throwaway skill that calls terminal tool with a simple script
completion_summary: End-to-end skill_manage create -> invoke -> delete cycle exercised against the live Hermes VM at v2026.5.16. Step 1 (create) called skill_manage via the Hermes venv python over ssh and returned success with the SKILL.md written under /root/.hermes/skills/foundation-06-echo/. Step 2 (discovery) confirmed via the same get_all_skills_dirs walk _find_skill uses. Step 3 (agent invocation) ran one chat turn with -s foundation-06-echo on opencode-go/deepseek-v4-flash: the agent skill_view'd the file, ran the terminal echo, and -- because the SKILL.md included a Cleanup section -- deleted the skill itself via skill_manage. Final response was the marker HERMES-APPRENTICE-FOUNDATION-06-MARKER verbatim. Step 4 verified the dir is gone and discovery no longer turns it up. Deliverables: notes/foundation-06/SKILL.md (the throwaway skill), notes/foundation-06/proof.md (full trace).
acceptance_criteria: Agent invokes it and returns output
Skill can be deleted after test
